title: DNA Extraction from Fluids
author: Julie Huber
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.k2ccyaw

steps.title: 80 mL MilliQ H 2 O (0
steps.instruction: 80 mL MilliQ H 2 O (0.22um Filtered) 10M NaOH to pH 8.0 MilliQ H 2 O to 100 mL (0.22um Filtered) Low heat to dissolve Autoclave TE buffer (50 mL, 0.01M Tris, 1mM EDTA, pH 8.
0.5 mL 1M Tris (pH 8.
0.1 mL 0.5M EDTA (pH 8.

49.4 mL MilliQ H 2 O (0.22um Filtered) Filter Sterilize 10M NaOH (100 mL) 40 grams NaOH Gradually add 90 ml MilliQ H 2 0 (0.22um Filtered) Bring volume up to 100 mL Store in plastic (can etch glass) 20% Sodium Dodecyl Sulfate (100 mL) 20 grams SDS Low heat to dissolve Sterile filter Do not autoclave! (SDS will irreversibly precipitate) 5M NaCl (100 mL) 29.22 grams NaCl (MW 58.

steps.title: 100 mL MillliQ H 2 O (0
steps.instruction: 100 mL MillliQ H 2 O (0.22um Filtered) Autoclave 0.5M Na 2 EDTA (100 mL, pH 8.
18.61 grams Na 2 EDTA (MW 372.

steps.title: 80 mL MilliQ H 2 O (0
steps.instruction: 80 mL MilliQ H 2 O (0.22um Filtered) ~ 2 grams NaOH pellets 10M NaOH to pH 8.0 MilliQ H 2 O to 100mL (0.22um Filtered) Autoclave 5% CTAB (100 mL) 5 grams Hexadecyltrimethylammonium Bromide 100 mL MilliQ H 2 O (0.22um Filtered) Low heat to dissolve Autoclave Proteinase K (10 mg/mL) Add 6 mL MilliQ H 2 O (0.22um Filtered) to 0.06 gram stock Store in aliquots at -20°C Lysozyme (50 mg/mL) Add 20 mL MilliQ H 2 O (0.22um Filtered) to 1 gram Lysozyme Store in aliquots at -20°C DNA Extraction Buffer (50 mL, 100mM Tris, 100mM EDTA, 100mM NaH 2 PO 4 , 1.5M NaCl, 1% CTAB) 5 mL 1M Tris 10 mL 0.5M EDTA 5 mL 1M NaH 2 PO 4 15 mL 5M NaCl 10 mL 5% CTAB 5 mL MilliQ H 2 O Filter Sterilize

steps.title: Cut filter into small pieces on...
steps.instruction: Cut filter into small pieces on sterile piece of foil using a clean sterile razor blade (autoclaved/ethanol flamed) and forceps (ethanol flamed).

steps.title: If extracting from a Sterivex, use...
steps.instruction: If extracting from a Sterivex, use pliers (ethanol-flamed) to crack cartridge, remove filter with razor blade, and cut into 6-8 pieces. Pour RNAlater from cartridge into 2ml tube to save for Step 4.

steps.title: Place filter in new 50ml tube...
steps.instruction: Place filter in new 50ml tube with 10mL of 1x PBS (autoclaved, 0.2um filtered).

steps.title: Rinse filter using forceps, then place in clean 2mL tube
steps.instruction: Rinse filter using forceps, then place in clean 2mL tube. Add 1mL of DEB to 2mL tube, place on ice.

steps.title: Pour RNAlater from 50ml filter tube...
steps.instruction: Pour RNAlater from 50ml filter tube into tube with 1x PBS rinse water and filter this solution through a 25mm 0.2um filter using a 60mL syringe. If only extracting half the filter, only pour off half the RNAlater.

steps.title: Rinse 25mm 0
steps.instruction: Rinse 25mm 0.2um filter with 10mL 1x PBS. Push air through filter to remove any liquid.

steps.title: Cut 25mm filter into pieces and...
steps.instruction: Cut 25mm filter into pieces and add to 2mL tube with filter and DEB.

steps.title: Add enzymes
steps.instruction: Add enzymes: Add 20 ul proteinase-K (10 mg/ml) and 40 ul of lysozyme (50 mg/ml) to 2mL tube, freeze tube at -80ºC for 15 minutes and thaw at 37ºC for 5 minutes three times. Can freeze at -80ºC until following day.

steps.title: 37ºC incubation
steps.instruction: 37ºC incubation: Incubate tube for 30 min at 37ºC in a water bath.

steps.title: SDS & 65ºC incubation
steps.instruction: SDS & 65ºC incubation: Add 50 ul filter-sterilized SDS (20% sln. in water) to each 2mL tube, invert several times to mix. Incubate for 2 hours in 65ºC in water bath.10. Phenol-Chloroform extraction: Working in a fume hood, fill 2mL tube the rest of the way (~ level with the base of the cap) with phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1, pH 8.0). Vortex. Centrifuge at low speed (3000 rpm) for 5 min. Transfer top layer to new 2mL tube and repeat (total 2 washes).

steps.title: Precipitation
steps.instruction: Precipitation: Estimate buffer volume from hash marks on side of 2mL tube, and add 0.6 volumes of room temperature 100% Isopropanol. Swirl or invert gently to mix. Incubate at room temperature for 2 hours to overnight in the dark.

steps.title: Pellet
steps.instruction: Pellet: Centrifuge tube at top speed (13000 rpm) for 30 min. Carefully pour off buffer+isopropanol (I pour into a 50ml falcon tube and look to see if the pellet poured off. If the pellet is invisible then it usually won’t pour off). Add 1 ml 70% EtOH to 2mL tube, invert several times, and centrifuge at 13000 rpm for 10 min. Pour off EtOH. Repeat for a total of 2 rinses. Dry down pellet in Speed Vac for ~15 minutes (flick tube to see if it’s completely dry). Pellets may detach from sides of tube, especially after second rinse.

steps.title: Elution
steps.instruction: Elution: Add 90-250 ul Nulcease-free sterile water or 1x TE buffer to 2mL tube, mix around (flick tube and shake down) to get all possible DNA wet. Allow pellet to dissolve for 1-2 hours in the refrigerator.

steps.title: Prepare working and archive stocks and...
steps.instruction: Prepare working and archive stocks and store at -20ºC / -80ºC.

steps.title: Picogreen to determine concentration of DNA
steps.instruction: Picogreen to determine concentration of DNA.
